section: ENG9_8 – A House Is Not a Home
title: A House Is Not a Home – Flashcard Concept Mastery
author: Zan Gaudioso

questions.question: Why did the author feel lonely in his new high school?
questions.correct_answer: Because his old friends went to a different school and he had to start again in a bigger school
questions.explanation: The author felt isolated since he was unfamiliar with the new environment and did not know many people.

questions.question: What strange thing did the author notice one Sunday afternoon?
questions.correct_answer: Smoke coming through the ceiling of the house
questions.explanation: The smoke indicated that the house had caught fire.

questions.question: Why did the author’s mother run back into the burning house?
questions.correct_answer: To save important documents and photographs of the author’s father
questions.explanation: The photographs and letters were precious memories of the author’s late father.

questions.question: Why did the author break down in tears after the fire?
questions.correct_answer: Because he thought his beloved cat was lost in the fire
questions.explanation: The cat was very dear to him and losing it made him feel deeply sad.

questions.question: Why was the author embarrassed at school the next day?
questions.correct_answer: Because he had no proper clothes, books or school supplies after the fire
questions.explanation: He had to wear borrowed shoes and had lost his backpack and belongings.

questions.question: How did the author’s classmates help him?
questions.correct_answer: They collected clothes, school supplies and other items for him
questions.explanation: Their kindness helped the author feel accepted and supported.

questions.question: What effect did the classmates’ kindness have on the author?
questions.correct_answer: It helped him overcome loneliness and make new friends
questions.explanation: Their support changed his understanding of people and life.

questions.question: Where had the cat gone after the fire?
questions.correct_answer: It had run over a mile away because it was frightened by the fire
questions.explanation: The cat had escaped during the fire and was later found by a woman.

questions.question: Who brought the cat back to the author?
questions.correct_answer: A kind woman who had taken care of the cat
questions.explanation: She used the phone number on the collar to identify the owner and return it.

questions.question: What is the main message of the story 'A House Is Not a Home'?
questions.correct_answer: A home is created by love, relationships and kindness rather than just a building
questions.explanation: The story shows that emotional bonds and support from others make a house feel like a home.

notes.title: Importance of Friendship
notes.content: The kindness shown by classmates helps the author overcome loneliness and feel accepted in his new school.

notes.title: Meaning of Home
notes.content: The story shows that love, memories and relationships are what truly make a place a home.

facts.fact: The author’s house was destroyed in a sudden fire.
The author’s cat survived the fire and was later returned by a kind woman.
